behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file (src/bun.js/VirtualMachine.zig), the function (resolveMaybeNeedsTrailingSlash), the pattern of saving/restoring log pointers, the package_manager log field, the reference implementation in ModuleLoader.zig, the line range (~1832-1845), and the variables (jsc_vm.log, resolver.log, linker.log, package_manager.log). no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly states 'The save/restore pattern in resolveMaybeNeedsTrailingSlash around lines 1832–1845 needs to also cover package_manager.log' and points to ModuleLoader.zig as a 'reference implementation.' This tells the agent exactly what to change (add package_manager.log to the save/restore pattern) and where to find how to do it. The agent doesn't need to reason about what to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use broad regex patterns like searching for 'package_manager' in a window with '.log = &log' or '.log = <identifier>', not exact line content or variable names. An alternative fix using different variable capture syntax (e.g., storing pm reference differently, or using a different accessor chain to reach package_manager) would still pass as long as the structural pattern is present.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every test reads VirtualMachine.zig source text and uses regex/string matching (e.g., 'assert re.search(r".log\s*=\s*&log", before_defer)'). No test compiles or executes the Zig code. The comment 'AST-only because: Zig source cannot be compiled without full bun build toolchain' acknowledges this is purely textual inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_pm_log_set_before_defer, test_pm_log_restored_in_defer, test_pm_log_set_before_resolve_call) all assert that 'package_manager' appears with '.log = &log' in specific regions of the function. The base commit code does NOT contain these patterns, so a stub or no-op would fail these tests. The agent must add actual package_manager log save/restore code.

behavior_in_tests.reason: instruction.md requires: (1) package_manager.log set to stack-local log before resolution, (2) package_manager.log restored in defer block, (3) existing save/restore for resolver/linker/jsc_vm log intact. All of these are tested by corresponding test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly grouped with section comments (fail_to_pass for core fix, pass_to_pass for existing functionality, static anti-stub, agent_config rules from CLAUDE.md). Each test has a descriptive name and docstring explaining what it checks.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces a source code patch, not structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB.

no_typos.reason: All filenames (VirtualMachine.zig, ModuleLoader.zig), function names (resolveMaybeNeedsTrailingSlash), variable names (jsc_vm, package_manager, transpiler, resolver, linker), and paths are consistent and correctly spelled throughout.
